introSection: Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Supercar currently located at Mack's Amusements in Cleethorpes, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
fullText: Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Supercar currently located at Mack's Amusements in Cleethorpes, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
